name: Crypt of Moss Galwood the 22nd
inscription: Remember Moss Galwood the 22nd of Harstead.

name: Sepulcher of Eris Falhaven the 10th
inscription: Eris Falhaven the 10th is recorded among the dead of Harstead.

name: Memorial Vault of Gala Elwick
inscription: Remember Gala Elwick of Harstead.
